title: GrowChief
description: All-in-one social media outreach automation tool using stealthy human-like browser automation (Playwright/Patchright).
installation: Primary web/backend image only (ghcr.io/growchief/growchief). GrowChief REQUIRES a Temporal orchestrator cluster as companion services that must be deployed separately: temporalio/auto-setup:1.28.1 (point TEMPORAL_ADDRESS at it on :7233), its own backing store temporalio postgres (postgres:16) and elasticsearch:7.17.27 for Temporal visibility, plus optional temporalio/admin-tools and temporalio/ui:2.34.0. The growchief app container also runs the NestJS workers internally and uses xvfb-driven headless browsers, so give it generous CPU/memory. ROTATE AUTH_SECRET (set to a random value, e.g. openssl rand -hex 32) and the postgres password before exposing. Uploads persist to /uploads via the mounted volume (STORAGE_PROVIDER=local). Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET for Google OAuth login, and APOLLO_API_KEY / DATAGMA_API_KEY for enrichment if used. The app listens on port 5000. First run: open the app URL and create the first account.
